whatsNew: Added Interactive Animation Group Sub-View allowing users to expand folders and interact directly with grouped assets.
Implemented Custom Animation Group Naming with an inline editor supporting smooth mouse interaction and keyboard shortcuts (Enter/Escape).
Added a Dissolve Group action to dissolve animation groups completely and return all sequences back to the main library.
Implemented Extract Selected animations action to extract specific animations from a folder back to the top-level main library.
improvements: Designed a premium sub-header banner specifically for Animation Groups featuring custom metadata counters (item counts, size, etc.) and direct actions.
Integrated double-click and custom hover overlays for animation groups to seamlessly open folder views.
Optimized animation group sizing and metadata propagation dynamically updating parent group properties upon animation extraction.
fixes: Resolved state management issue to safely update selected animation listings during group transitions.
Prevented parent group cards from showing up inside sub-view folder grids.
